title: Transitional Housing/Shelter * Pregnant Individuals - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Transitional Housing/Shelter * Pregnant Individuals 3 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Homeless Youth nsitional Housing/Shelter AIDS/HIV Crime Victims Disabilities Issues Homeless Families Homeless Men Homeless Veterans Homeless Women Pregnant Individuals Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CHURCH @ THE PARK VILLAGE OF HOPE VILLAGE OF HOPE MICRO SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transitional housing with access to case management services. Clients must be able to manage their own activities of daily living, including eating, bathing, and mobility. This program operates on a waitlist. Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older and pregnant women. One pet per adult is admitted. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 507-4992 Visit Website More Details FAMILY PROMISE OF TUALATIN VALLEY FAMILY SHELTER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers long-term transitional housing with case management and specialized information and referral resources to assist clients in finding sustainable housing. Does not provide emergency or short-term shelter. 11460 SW Pacific Highway Portland, OR 97223 Eligibility: Homeless families and pregnant women currently experiencing homelessness or within 14 days of homelessness occurring Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 640-3263 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SAMARITAN HOUSE RESIDENCY PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 10-month transitional living program where residents can establish rental history, receive guidance on education and employment, and access limited child care. Residents are required to deposit at least 60% of their monthly income into a savings account through the organization, which is then used to cover move-in costs when they transition to a new residence. 715 SW Bay Street Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Pregnant women within 14 days of birth or homeless families with dependent children under the age of 18. Parents must have custody of their children at least 50% of the time. Residents must not use drugs or alcohol while completing the program. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm (541) 574-8898 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FAMILY PROMISE OF TUALATIN VALLEY FAMILY SHELTER PROGRAM SAMARITAN HOUSE RESIDENCY PROGRAM
